content: isplain  Table of contents Prototype: isplain(filename) Return type: boolean Description: Returns whether the named object filename is a plain/regular file. Arguments: filename : string - File object name - in the range: "?(/.*) Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { classes : "fileisplain" expression => isplain ( "/etc/passwd" ); "dirisnotplain" not => isplain ( "/" ); reports : fileisplain :: "/etc/passwd is plain.." ; dirisnotplain :: "/ is not plain.." ; } Output: code R: /etc/passwd is plain.. R: / is not plain.. See also: fileexists() , filestat() , isdir() , islink() , returnszero()
